headline: Leandro Trossard
body: 🇧🇪 Leandro Trossard has agreed to Beşiktaş’ financial offer ✅ 🇹🇷✈️ The Belgian is expected to travel to Istanbul early next week to complete his move to the Süper Lig. BJK mercato AFC
raw_text:
🇧🇪 Leandro Trossard has agreed to Beşiktaş’ financial offer ✅

🇹🇷✈️ The Belgian is expected to travel to Istanbul early next week to complete his move to the Süper Lig. #BJK #mercato #AFC
